purpose: Define deterministic source-hub routing between semanticgis.dk and semanticgis.org for all project queries.

semanticgis_dk.primary_scope: Danish national and municipal data contracts

typical_sources: Global basemaps and global reference layers

default_hub_selection.if_question_scope: Danish register entity, codebook, or legal semantics
OSM, global imagery, or international reference data

routing_policy.mixed_source_rule: A Danish project may combine semanticgis_dk and semanticgis_org in the same pipeline. Hub selection is per source, not per project.
conflict_resolution: Prefer hub-specific canonical contract for the source being used.
Do not infer service/auth rules from another hub.
If equivalent contracts exist on both hubs, use the hub matching source jurisdiction.
